phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è la fermata dell'autobus, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH lah fehr-MAH-tah del-low-toh-BOOS, per fah-VOH-reh

responses.english: Down in the street, on the right.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, ci sono bagni pubblici, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, chee SOH-noh BAH-nyee POOB-blee-chee, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Scusi, si possono fare foto, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, see POS-soh-noh FAH-reh FOH-toh, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.intent_en: Ask what time the square is least crowded
phrases.text_local: Scusi, a che ora è meno affollato Piazzale Michelangelo?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, ah keh OH-rah eh MEH-noh af-fol-LAH-toh PYAHT-tsah-leh mee-kel-AN-jeh-loh?
phrases.cultural_note: Piazzale Michelangelo offers Florence's most famous panoramic view, best at sunrise before the tour groups arrive.

responses.english: At sunrise or after 6 pm, far fewer people.
responses.phonetic: al-LAL-bah oh DOH-poh leh dee-CHOT-toh, MOL-toh MEH-noh JEN-teh.
responses.french: All'alba o dopo le diciotto, molto meno gente.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which bus goes up from the centre
phrases.text_local: Scusi, quale autobus sale al Piazzale Michelangelo dal centro?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KWAH-leh ow-toh-BOOS SAH-leh al PYAHT-tsah-leh mee-kel-AN-jeh-loh dal CHEN-troh?

responses.english: The 13, from Santa Maria Novella station.
responses.phonetic: eel treh-DEE-chee, DAL-lah stah-TSYOH-neh SAN-tah mah-REE-ah noh-VEL-lah.
responses.french: Il 13, dalla stazione Santa Maria Novella.
